known_risks: Exit improvements may be path-shape-specific unless validated out of sample.
Small frozen entry sample limits archetype reliability.

rationale.why_this_family: Current blocker is exit-path robustness for frozen high-quality BNR continuation entries.
rationale.why_not_entry_changes: Entry set is frozen to avoid reopening the exhausted benchmark/search layer.
rationale.why_not_tp_sl_optimization_first: Path behavior must explain failure modes before direct TP/SL tuning is allowed.
